title: EduComp Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: EduComp Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!
